race.comment: DR HOOK (2) raced three times in stakes races to launch this prep, the best effort a 2.5 length defeat in the 1400m Sires at Flemington. Disappointed last time when claimed late as a short-priced favourite over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Should make amends today. HARAS (3) is back from a 29-week spell. Raced twice in the maiden prep, the highlight a narrow defeat on debut over 1000m at this track. Big recent trial winner who looks set for a positive return. LORD ELROND (4) returned from a spell as a gelding recently and turned in an eye-catching effort at Wagga, closing hard to finish second over 1000m. Will be tough to hold out over an extra 100m this time. CORMIER (16) is a Maurice colt on debut for Messara/Gavranich. Highly impressive in a recent Muswellbrook trial. Only has to negotiate a wide gate successfully to be in the finish. MEGA PIXEL (1) is back from a five-month spell. Placed at all three runs to date and from a nice alley should be thereabouts again.
